comment.body:
Two quick things:
1) this already exists, with the TRADES thread at the top of the dated daily chains... and replies are shut off just as you suggested. Here is the link; https://open.substack.com/chat/posts/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=1kb28g
2) a separate daily chain with a few hundred comments and replies, plus the separate ones by educational topic, doesn't seem too much IMO. I belong the Le Shrub too on substack and his chains can span multiple days and have 1000s of iterations. Just my two cents
